title: ADDUSTOUR
description: Official mobile news application delivering real-time news, articles, and media content.
detailedDescription: A comprehensive news ecosystem for Jordan's leading daily newspaper. The app provides a high-performance reading experience with offline caching, multimedia integration, and a sophisticated notification system.
features: Categorized news browsing with media support
Advanced push notification system with image support
Persistent offline caching for news reading
Social media integration and native sharing
Optimized background services for real-time updates

title: ALBASHEQ
description: Premium digital card purchasing platform with secure transaction handling and printing.
detailedDescription: A robust financial platform designed for rapid digital asset procurement. It supports complex Bluetooth thermal printing and secure API integrations to ensure transactions are processed safely and efficiently.
features: Bluetooth thermal printer integration for receipts

title: Golden Mark
description: Enterprise-grade digital asset management and purchasing system for financial services.
detailedDescription: Custom-built for institutional financial services, Golden Mark provides a high-reliability gateway for purchasing and managing digital cards across various providers.
features: Offline mode for recent transaction viewing

title: SADAD
description: All-in-one payment gateway for secure billing, transactions, and gift card purchases.
detailedDescription: SADAD simplifies the digital payment experience by consolidating billers, card providers, and P2P transfers into a single, cohesive mobile interface focused on speed and security.
features: Digital gift center with instant issuance
Unified transaction ledger across all services

title: Pack and Go
description: Collaborative real-estate listing platform with advanced mapping and communication tools.
detailedDescription: A modern take on real estate discovery, Pack and Go emphasizes spatial navigation and agent-client collaboration, making property hunting a streamlined experience.
features: In-app collaboration hubs for agents and seekers

title: TrendUp
description: A social marketplace for product reselling with integrated profit tracking.
detailedDescription: TrendUp empowers users to build their own e-commerce businesses by providing a platform to purchase products at margin and resell them through a curated social marketplace.
features: Social reselling portal with direct sharing

title: Package
description: Advanced digital directory and ÙÙ†ÛŒ service aggregator with geographic filtering.
detailedDescription: Package bridges the gap between technical service providers and clients, offering a localized directory that ensures users find verified professionals within their immediate vicinity.

title: Thamin
description: AI-driven market appraisal platform for used goods with professional Ø±Ù¾ÙˆØ±Ù¹ generation.
detailedDescription: Thamin uses advanced AI to analyze historical market data and provide users with professional-grade valuations and PDF reports for second-hand assets.

title: Khair Al-Madina
description: Humanitarian logistics platform coordinating water donations for mosques.
detailedDescription: A specialized logistics app that coordinates donors, water suppliers, and mosques to ensure humanitarian aid is delivered precisely where it's needed with full transparency.
features: Supply chain coordination with delivery firms
Mosque location directory via Google Maps

title: Jamala
description: Comprehensive e-commerce platform for digital shopping experiences.
detailedDescription: Jamala is a modern e-commerce application built with Flutter, offering a seamless user experience for browsing, purchasing, and tracking products with secure payment integrations.

title: Leap Tech
description: Innovative enterprise solutions for financial asset management.
detailedDescription: Leap Tech provides high-performance tools for managing financial digital assets, focusing on efficiency, security, and real-time data synchronization for institutional clients.

title: Nejam Al Kora
description: Real-time sports news and media application for football enthusiasts.
detailedDescription: A dedicated sports app delivering the latest football news, match schedules, live scores, and exclusive media content to a passionate fan base.

title: Car Washing
description: On-demand car maintenance and professional washing services.
detailedDescription: This application simplifies car care by allowing users to book professional car washing and minor maintenance services at their preferred time and location.

AMA E-Commerce is a comprehensive dual-app platform that streamlines online shopping and last-mile delivery. The User App provides a rich shopping experience with advanced search, personalized recommendations, and real-time order tracking. The Delivery Man App equips couriers with route optimization, order management, digital proof of delivery, and transparent earnings tracking.
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with a User App and a Delivery Man App for seamless shopping and logistics.
features: Dual-app architecture: User App + Delivery Man App
Advanced product search with smart filters
Real-time order tracking from purchase to doorstep
GPS route optimization for delivery personnel
Push notifications for offers and order updates
title: AMA E-Commerce
Arkanoid Game
description: A Java-based classic arcade Arkanoid game with power-ups, enemies, laser cannons, and multi-level gameplay.
detailedDescription: A full-featured Java implementation of the classic Arkanoid arcade game. Players control a paddle to bounce a ball and destroy bricks across progressively harder levels. Features a rich power-up system (laser cannon, multi-ball, sticky ball, paddle expansion), enemies that fight back with weapons, and a fully object-oriented design with a complete class hierarchy. The final level introduces a boss enemy requiring 25 hits to defeat.
features: Power-up system: laser cannon, multi-ball, sticky ball, size expansion
Destructible bricks with hit counters — some require multiple hits
Enemy AI that moves on the board and attacks the paddle with weapons
Boss level: final enemy with 25 HP and its own weapon
Randomly generated brick patterns per level
Player stats: name, score, and high score tracking
Laser Cannon and Shoot-Gun weapons with intensity and duration
Full OOP design with a detailed class diagram

title: Retail PC Stores
description: Full-featured POS system for retail stores with offline support, barcode scanning, USB printing, and multi-language Arabic/English UI.
detailedDescription: Retail PC Stores is a professional Point of Sale (POS) application designed for retail businesses. It supports full offline operation with on-device SQLite storage, seamlessly syncing when connectivity is restored. Key capabilities include USB barcode scanner integration, thermal receipt printing via USB, screenshot-based invoice generation, and advanced data grids for inventory and sales management. The app is fully localized for Arabic and English markets with an adaptive theme engine.
features: Full offline-first operation with SQLite local database
USB barcode scanner integration for fast product lookup
USB thermal receipt printer support with dotted-line formatting
SyncFusion DataGrid for advanced inventory and sales tables
Arabic & English localization with NeoSansArabic font
Connectivity-aware sync — queues actions offline, syncs on reconnect
Multi-select product filtering and batch operations
Responsive layout for tablets and desktops (responsive_framework)

title: IoT Parking System
description: IoT-based smart parking management system that tracks real-time parking space availability using connected sensors and WebSockets.
detailedDescription: A Flutter application built around real-time IoT sensor integration for smart city parking management. The system communicates with hardware sensors over WebSockets to provide live updates on parking space occupancy, helping drivers quickly locate available spots. Built to address urban parking congestion, the app reduces time spent searching for parking and improves overall space utilization efficiency.
features: Real-time parking space availability via IoT sensors
WebSocket-based live data streaming from hardware
Visual parking map with available/occupied indicators
Animated UI with smooth transitions and avatar glow effects
Designed for smart city and campus parking scenarios

title: Speech Emotion Recognition
description: Real-time speech emotion recognition system using deep learning (LSTM) with a Flutter mobile app and web interface.
detailedDescription: A graduation project focused on building an efficient real-time system that accurately identifies emotions from speech signals. The system employs preprocessing, multi-level feature extraction (MFCC, Mel Spectrogram, ZCR), and a CUDA-enabled LSTM deep learning model for high-accuracy classification across diverse emotion datasets. It includes a user-friendly mobile application and a web interface for seamless human-computer interaction.
features: Real-time emotion identification from audio signals
Multi-platform support: Web-based and Mobile UI
Feature extraction using MFCC and Mel Spectrograms
Trained on Ryerson (RAVDESS) and Toronto (TESS) datasets
Instant emotion detection visualization and results display

title: E-commerce Backend API
description: Robust .NET 8.0 enterprise-grade backend for scalable e-commerce platforms with Stripe and SignalR.
detailedDescription: A high-performance, enterprise-ready backend solution engineered with .NET 8.0 and ASP.NET Core. Built on Clean Architecture principles, it integrates advanced features like Stripe for seamless payments, SignalR for real-time order updates, and Azure Identity for secure authentication. The system employs the Repository and Unit of Work patterns for efficient SQL Server data management, ensuring a highly scalable and maintainable infrastructure for modern e-commerce services.
features: Stripe.net integration for secure payment processing
MailKit & MimeKit for professional email services
Clean Architecture with Repository and Unit of Work patterns
SQL Server integration with Entity Framework Core
Global error handling and middleware optimization
